title: cirsium pumilum var. pumilum
intro: Cirsium pumilum var. pumilum, also known as dwarf thistle or small-flowered thistle, is a variety of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Cirsium pumilum var. pumilum include its ability to inhibit inflammation and reduce fever, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant has several health benefits, including its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to lower blood pressure. Cirsium pumilum var. pumilum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
